$comment: Topic backlog for the autonomous blog-writer agent. See .claude/agents/blog-writer.md. Agent pops from pending[] by priority (desc) then insertion order. Moves picked topics to published[]. Hand-edit freely.

pending.title_hint: How fiber changes stool consistency: soluble vs insoluble
pending.brief: Explain soluble vs insoluble fiber, the Bristol-scale outcomes of each, recommended daily intake, practical food sources, and what happens when you suddenly increase fiber.

pending.title_hint: Why does my stool float? Causes and when to worry
pending.brief: Gas vs fat content as causes of floating stool. When it's benign (high-fiber meal, legumes) vs a sign of malabsorption (steatorrhea, celiac, pancreatic insufficiency). Red flags that warrant a doctor visit.

pending.title_hint: The gut-brain axis: how your microbiome affects mood and anxiety
pending.brief: Vagus nerve, enteric nervous system, serotonin production in the gut (90% of body's serotonin), current evidence linking microbiome to depression/anxiety, practical implications for stress management.

pending.title_hint: Black stool: benign causes vs medical emergencies
pending.brief: Differentiate melena (upper GI bleed, tarry + foul) from dietary causes (iron, bismuth, blueberries, licorice). When to go to the ER. Link to poop-color post as cornerstone.

pending.title_hint: How long does food take to digest? A transit-time guide
pending.brief: Normal transit times by meal composition, the mouth-to-toilet journey (stomach: 2-5h, small intestine: 3-5h, large intestine: 10-59h). Why transit time matters for stool consistency and nutrient absorption.

pending.title_hint: The low-FODMAP diet: a practical guide for IBS
pending.brief: What FODMAPs are, Monash University research foundation, 3-phase protocol (elimination, reintroduction, personalization), typical high/low FODMAP foods, evidence for IBS symptom reduction. Link to existing IBS post.

pending.title_hint: Probiotics vs prebiotics: what's the difference and which do you need?
pending.brief: Define each, explain synbiotics, review evidence (which strains work for what), food sources of each, when supplements are worth it vs waste of money. Nuanced — don't oversell.

pending.title_hint: Why does my poop smell so bad? What stool odor means
pending.brief: Normal odor sources (sulfur compounds from protein breakdown), dietary contributors, abnormal smells (very foul = malabsorption, sweet = C. diff, metallic = GI bleeding). When to see a doctor.

pending.title_hint: Constipation: causes, evidence-based remedies, and when to see a doctor
pending.brief: Functional vs secondary constipation, Rome IV criteria, first-line remedies (fiber, fluid, movement), OTC options (osmotic vs stimulant laxatives), red-flag symptoms warranting workup.

pending.title_hint: Diarrhea: causes, home care, and red flags
pending.brief: Acute vs chronic, common causes (viral, bacterial, food intolerance, medication), hydration and BRAT diet, when antibiotics do and don't help, red flags (blood, fever, >2 days persistent).

pending.title_hint: Why do I poop right after coffee? The gastrocolic reflex explained
pending.brief: The gastrocolic reflex, why coffee amplifies it (chlorogenic acids, caffeine minor role), why mornings are the natural peak, how to leverage for regularity.

pending.title_hint: Fermented foods vs probiotic supplements: which is better for your gut?
pending.brief: Stanford fermented-foods study (Sonnenburg 2021), why whole-food fermented options often outperform pills on diversity and inflammation markers, when supplements are still the right call.

pending.title_hint: Gut microbiome tests: are they worth the money in 2026?
pending.brief: State of consumer microbiome testing (Viome, Zoe, Thryve), what current science can and can't tell you from a stool sample, where the field is going, honest take on value for money today.

pending.title_hint: How hydration affects your stool: the water-constipation link
pending.brief: Mechanism (colon water reabsorption), how much water you actually need (by body weight + activity), electrolyte role, caffeine/alcohol effects, practical daily-intake targets.

pending.title_hint: Does exercise make you poop? The science of movement and motility
pending.brief: Mechanisms (mechanical agitation, vagal tone, blood-flow shifts), runner's trots explained, evidence for endurance vs resistance training, practical recommendations for gut health.
